title: BusMessage
description: Base message envelope for all inter-agent communication. Every message on the bus conforms to this shape. Specialised message types (delegation, report, escalation, status-update) extend the payload field with their own structure.

id.description: Unique message identifier. Format: msg_ + 12 lowercase alphanumeric chars.

taskId.description: The task this message relates to. Every bus message is anchored to a task.

type.description: Message type. Determines which payload schema applies.

payload.description: Type-specific payload. Validated against the corresponding specialised schema (delegation, report, escalation, or status-update).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the message was created.

replyTo.description: If this message is a response to a prior message, the original message ID. Creates a conversation thread on the bus.
